recommendations.title: Hellion
recommendations.overview: When motocross and heavy metal obsessed, 13-year-old Jacob's delinquent behavior forces CPS to place his little brother Wes with his aunt, Jacob and his emotionally absent father must finally take responsibility for their actions and each other in or

recommendations.title: Cousin Ben Troop Screening
recommendations.overview: Cousin Ben hosts a screening of Wes Anderson's Moonrise Kingdom to the troops.

recommendations.title: The Hills Have Eyes
recommendations.overview: Based on Wes Craven's 1977 suspenseful cult classic, The Hills Have Eyes is the story of a family road trip that goes terrifyingly awry when the travelers become stranded in a government atomic zone. Miles from nowhere, the Carter family soon realize

recommendations.title: The Vicious Kind
recommendations.overview: A man tries to warn his brother away from the new girlfriend he brings home during Thanksgiving, but ends up becoming infatuated with her in the process.

recommendations.title: The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar and Three More
recommendations.overview: Four tales unfold in Wes Anderson's anthology of short films adapted from Roald Dahl's beloved stories, "The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar", "The Swan", "The Rat Catcher", and "Poison."

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: The Big Shave
recommendations.overview: A young man walks into a meticulously clean and sterile bathroom and proceeds to shave away hair, then skin, in an increasingly bloody and graphic bathroom scene.

recommendations.title: An American Werewolf in Paris
recommendations.overview: An American man unwittingly gets involved with werewolves who have developed a serum allowing them to transform at will.

recommendations.title: There's Something in the Barn
recommendations.overview: An American family fulfills their dream of moving back to their roots after inheriting a remote cabin in the mountains of Norway. But there's a surprise waiting for them.

recommendations.title: He Never Died
recommendations.overview: Jack is a solitary man with a mysterious past. His strange habits will soon become stranger when his past catches up with him.
